caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with white text that reads "I CON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a room decorated with framed photos and clothing racks. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone. To his right stands a white mannequin wearing white clothing. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, circular logos are visible, and small red text that reads "FULLY LOADED" appears on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, initially holding up two fingers and then moving his hand closer to his face. His facial expression shifts from a focused, speaking expression to a slight smile. The background remains static, showing a wall of framed pictures and garments hanging on a rack behind him.
